articles.title: GameStop Wants to Gobble Up eBay — and Pokémon Card Fans Are Worried!
articles.summary: GameStop might buy eBay, and that could make it harder (and more expensive!) to find rare Pokémon cards and retro games. The deal could happen this month. Imagine one company controlling where you buy your favorite collectibles!

articles.title: This Tiny Flame Warrior Proves Tough Games Can Be Kind, Too!
articles.summary: In Solateria, you play as a tiny flame hero who can’t swim (because fire + water = bad!). It’s a tough game like Dark Souls, but it lets you change the difficulty and even marks secret paths on your map. Finally, a hard game that helps you learn!

articles.title: The Fire Emblem Game That Saved the Series — and It’s 30 Years Old!
articles.summary: Long before Fire Emblem Awakening saved the series, a 1996 game called Genealogy of the Holy War did something amazing: it let you play as parents, then their kids! It’s full of huge maps, shocking twists, and even a surprise rescue mission.
